title: Senior Interior Designer
description:
Join Our Creative Team at SOG Design!

Are you passionate about interior design and eager to work on diverse projects? SOG Design is a leading architectural and interior design firm dedicated to designing cutting-edge structures that inspire and transform spaces, is looking for a talented Senior Interior Designer to join our dynamic team.

About Us: At SOG Design, we pride ourselves on delivering innovative and high-quality design solutions to our clients. Our collaborative environment allows you to work closely with architects and designers from our regional offices, ensuring a holistic approach to every project

We are currently looking for a highly motivated Senior Interior Designer to join our team based in Singapore. As a Senior Designer, your main responsibility will be to collaborate closely with the SOG Design lead on design and construction projects across Singapore and the Asia Pacific region, while also contributing to the expansion of our interior design capabilities. You will play a crucial role in producing design work for architectural projects, including the creation of presentations, 3D models, graphics, and visualization documents to effectively communicate design ideas and project concepts to clients.

Roles and Responsibilities:

• Display exceptional creativity and innovative thinking while delivering high-quality design and technical work, inspiring others.

• Execute the complete design process, starting from initial sketches and continuing through to the beginning of production.

• Demonstrate a comprehensive understanding of the design process and project objectives, coordinating the preparation of project deliverables and other related activities.

• Apply your expertise in all phases of Interior Design project deliverables, from Concept Design to Construction Administration, to ensure the successful realization of design concepts.

• Work independently or with minimal supervision on various assignments, including conceptual design, schematic design, design development, space planning, and construction documentation.

• Foster a boundlessly creative approach and constantly push the boundaries.

• Actively participate in internal and consultant meetings.

• Possess excellent time management, communication, collaboration, and multitasking skills, including the ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines, while also being capable of working independently.

• Exemplify a collaborative work environment that encourages innovation and the sharing of best practices.

• Take a leadership role in team efforts, delegating work to team members to enable them to work autonomously.

• Cultivate professional relationships across the organization and actively seek leadership opportunities by guiding and supporting junior team members.

• Develop effective relationships with clients and consultants.

• Assist senior colleagues in client presentations and make valuable contributions during project meetings and client engagements.

• Take responsibility for aspects of project budgeting and collaborate with stakeholders to ensure successful project delivery.

• Strive to gain a working understanding of cost control, fee management, project finance, and explore methods to maximize project fees without jeopardizing client relationships and potential future work opportunities.

Job Requirements:

• Possess a Bachelor's or Master's degree in a relevant design field or hold equivalent certification, with professional registration preferred.

• Singaporeans and Singapore PRs are preferred for the position

• Fluent in both spoken and written English.

• Have at least 6 years of experience working on large-scale, mixed-use projects.

• Display enthusiasm for architecture and design, along with a commitment to reliability and teamwork.

• Proficient in commonly used computer applications within the field, with expertise in Revit being essential.

• Showcase exceptional design talent through a portfolio that demonstrates creativity and innovative thinking.

• Have a successful track record of delivering large-scale projects through all stages of work, particularly within the APAC regions.

• Possess strong organizational and supervisory skills, with a proven ability to manage projects and teams to achieve excellent results.

• Demonstrate leadership abilities and a desire to mentor junior staff.

• Exhibit excellent time management, communication, organizational, and collaboration skills.

• Coordinate and integrate the work of external contractors, suppliers, and professionals.

postedCompany.description:
We are a globally renowned design company with offices in Barcelona, China, Vietnam and India. Our areas of expertise span across Masterplan, Architecture, and Interior Design, and we have successfully executed numerous international projects. Through our extensive experience, we have gained significant expertise in Commercial, Hospitality, and Mixed Use projects.

Our company operates with unwavering enthusiasm by combining a team of creative individuals, technical experts, and international professionals, constantly generating fresh ideas. We leverage the latest technologies to ensure our design solutions are effective and innovative. Our commitment to delivering exceptional results is reflected in our approach, which integrates talent, knowledge, and a global perspective.
postedCompany.name: SOG DESIGN PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
